'''Dasobo Meats''' was a meat-shipping company based on [[Yulant]]. They distributed for the [[Salliche Agricultural Corporation|Salliche Ag Corporation]]. Sometime before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Salliche sued Dasobo, claiming Dasobo stole their genetic secrets used to breed [[Gornt/Legends|gornts]], which Salliche discovered by utilizing nanoscopic analyses of their [[Gornt Cutlets]].

{{Company-stub}}
